Base IV: N/A - Category E, no DCF run
MoS Entry Zone: N/A - PASS verdict, no entry recommended
Thesis: Commodity-linked cable and power-EPC manufacturer priced at a steep discount to listed peers (19.8-25.3x FY26 P/E vs 40-65x for Polycab/KEI/Havells), but FY26 record profit was boosted by a one-time subsidiary-sale gain and coincided with negative operating cash flow, a sharply deteriorating receivables cycle (DSO 135->196 days), and a four-year declining RoCE trend (22.1%->13.3%). O'Glove-style earnings-quality checks grade SUSPECT-to-UNRELIABLE, a hard entry blocker independent of Category E treatment.
